parsed.production_notes: The video features a split-screen layout. The top half shows a human-recorded female, while the bottom half shows a 3D animated AI avatar. The avatar's lip-syncing and movements are typical of AI-generated or animated characters.

characters.appearance: Young adult female, slim build, fair complexion, long dark hair. She has a soft, friendly face with subtle makeup.
characters.demeanor: Friendly, curious, and slightly hesitant but willing to learn.

characters.appearance: 3D animated female character, fair complexion, reddish-orange hair styled up. She has large green eyes and stylized, expressive facial features.

scenes.setting: Top: A bright, modern room with a window and white walls. Bottom: A cozy, dimly lit room with string lights and a bed in the background.

panels.panel_visual_description: A young woman with long dark hair is framed in a close-up shot. She is looking directly at the camera, smiling and speaking. The background is a brightly lit room with a window, white walls, and a white trash can visible. Her expressions change from smiling to thoughtful as she interacts.

A 3D animated female character with reddish-orange hair is framed in a close-up shot. She is looking directly at the camera, speaking with animated facial expressions. The background is a cozy room with warm lighting, featuring string lights, a bed, and some plush toys on a shelf.

scenes.visual_description: The screen is split horizontally. The top half shows a real young woman in a bright room, while the bottom half shows a 3D animated female character in a cozy, warmly lit room. Both characters are looking at the camera and appear to be having a conversation. Text overlays and Japanese flags appear on the screen throughout the scene.
scenes.audio_transcript:
Character B says: 日本語できますか？ (Nihongo dekimasu ka?) [Can you speak Japanese?]
Character A says: はい (Hai) [Yes]
Character B says: 한번 해봐! [Try it once!]
Character A says: こんにちは (Konnichiwa) [Hello]
Character B says: 좋아, 또? [Good, what else?]
Character A says: ありがとう (Arigatou) [Thank you]
Character B says: 그럼 "미안해"는 일어로? [Then how do you say "sorry" in Japanese?]
Character A says: 으음... すみません! (Sumimasen!) [Umm... Sorry!]
Character B says: 맞아! 근데 이런 말도 있어. ごめんなさい (Gomen nasai) [Right! But there's also this word. I'm sorry]
Character A says: ごめんなさい (Gomen nasai) [I'm sorry]
Character B says: 오케이, 너의 일본어 레벨은 A1이야. [Okay, your Japanese level is A1.]
Character A says: 나 일본 애니 진짜 좋아해서 많이 봤는데, 잘 안 늘어... [I really like Japanese anime so I watched a lot, but I don't improve much...]
Character B says: 걱정마, 나랑 회화 연습하자. [Don't worry, let's practice conversation with me.]
Character A says: 엥?? 너랑? [Huh?? With you?]
Character B says: 나는 Praktika의 AI 일본어 튜터야! 한 달이면 네가 일본어를 유창하게 말하게 해줄게! [I am Praktika's AI Japanese tutor! In one month, I'll make you speak Japanese fluently!]
Character A says: 근데 나는 AI는 좀... [But I'm a bit hesitant about AI...]
Character B says: 요즘 AI 안 쓰면 바보야! [These days, you're a fool if you don't use AI!]
Character A says: 그런가...? 알았어. 한번 해보자! [Is that so...? Okay. Let's try it!]
Character B says: 좋아 근데 먼저, 선생님한테 예의를 차려야지? 따라해봐 お願いします (Onegaishimasu) [Good, but first, you should show respect to your teacher, right? Repeat after me. Please take care of me.]
Character A says: お願いします (Onegaishimasu) [Please take care of me.]
Character B says: 좋아!! 당장 Praktika 다운받아! [Good!! Download Praktika right now!]
Character A says: 알겠어~ Praktika에서 만나! [Okay~ See you on Praktika!]

panels.panel_visual_description: A solid purple background with no characters or props.

scenes.visual_description: A solid purple screen displays the Praktika logo in the center. Below the logo are two app store badges: 'Download on the App Store' and 'GET IT ON Google Play'.
scenes.on_screen_text:
Praktika
Download on the App Store
GET IT ON Google Play
